episodes.title: The Biggest Scandal In Church Of England History | See No Evil | Channel 4
episodes.description:
Discussions of abuse and suicide that some viewers may find upsetting.

A forensic exploration of the sinister world and psychology of prolific abuser John Smyth, and the biggest scandal in Church of England history. Featuring never-seen-before interviews.

Smyth launches a covert and brutal regime of abuse in the 1980s in Winchester. How did he weaponise faith? And how did his actions impact on others?

Smyth moves to Zimbabwe, where the abuse - and cover-ups - continue. Featuring interviews with victims and Smyth's family, this episode charts his eventual downfall and the seismic scandal to follow.

SUBSCRIBE: https://youtube.com/@4Uncovered?si=vZSX9TS1vcQikjXr

Welcome to 4Uncovered, the place to uncover the forces shaping our world today. From influential figures defining culture, to economic truths impacting everyday life. Dive into the scandals, policies and controversies changing society.
